PlayerSearchRequest.description:
Public body for POST /v1/players/search.

Scope (`sport`/`gender`/`division`) is required and drives RLS. The
remaining fields are a curated, sport-agnostic subset of the internal
manual-search filters; richer catalog-driven filters come in a later rev.

cursor.title: Cursor

division.description: Division scope; may be a comma-joined NCAA list, e.g. 'D1,D2'.
division.title: Division

PlayerSearchRequest.title: PlayerSearchRequest

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key created at https://magisterial.ai/console/api-keys, sent as `Authorization: Bearer mag_live_...`.

info.description:
REST API for college sports data across NCAA D1/D2/D3, NAIA, and NJCAA:
players, teams, rosters, cross-program careers, games, the live transfer
portal, and an agent-backed natural-language query endpoint.

## Authentication

Every endpoint requires an API key sent as a bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer mag_live_...
```

Create and manage keys in the developer console at
[magisterial.ai/console/api-keys](https://magisterial.ai/console/api-keys).
Keys are prefixed `mag_live_` (production) or `mag_test_`.

## Scoping

Data access is scoped by `sport`, `division`, and (for dual-gender sports)
`gender`. Valid values come from `GET /v1/sports` and `GET /v1/divisions`;
some endpoints accept comma-joined NCAA divisions, e.g. `D1,D2`.

## Pagination

List endpoints paginate with an opaque `cursor`. Pass the `next_cursor` from
one response as the `cursor` of the next request; `has_more` signals whether
another page exists.

## Errors

Every 4xx/5xx returns a JSON envelope:

```json
{ "error": { "type": "invalid_request", "code": "invalid_scope", "message": "..." } }
```

The one exception is request validation (422), which uses FastAPI's standard
`{"detail": [...]}` shape. Rate-limited responses (429) include
`X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Reset`, and
`Retry-After` headers.

## Billing

Endpoints marked *usage-billed* (`/v1/portal`, `/v1/query`, `/v1/alerts`)
require API billing to be enabled on the account and meter usage against a
monthly budget; the free endpoints are included with any API key. A 402
response means billing is not enabled or the budget is exhausted.
info.summary: College sports data: players, teams, careers, games, the transfer portal, and natural-language query.
info.title: Magisterial Developer API

get.description:
All alerts created through the API for this account, newest first.
Alerts created in the app are not visible here.

active alert per calendar month, charged on creation. Webhook delivery is
not yet live — poll GET /v1/alerts/{alert_id}/matches.

a minute). Billed by token usage once the run completes.
